---
applyTo: "_posts/**/*.markdown"
description: "Use when editing blog posts in _posts to preserve frontmatter, summaries, and publishing conventions."
---

# Posts Instructions

## Frontmatter
- Keep existing frontmatter keys and formatting style.
- Preserve permalink and date behaviour unless explicitly asked to change it.
- Keep summary fields concise and present for homepage excerpts.

## Content edits
- Preserve original meaning and voice unless a rewrite is requested.
- Keep headings semantic and consistent with existing Markdown style.
- Use HTTPS for all new external links.

## Accessibility and media
- Ensure images have meaningful alt text in Markdown image syntax when content-relevant.
- Avoid adding large inline HTML blocks inside posts unless necessary.

## Safety
- Do not change post URLs or slugs without explicit approval.
- Do not edit generated files under _site.
